name: JoAi: Delete Contact Activity

description.en: Remove a single activity (note, call, meeting, email, task, or custom event) from a contact's timeline — useful for cleaning up duplicates or obsolete entries.
description.de: Entferne eine einzelne Aktivität (Notiz, Anruf, Meeting, E-Mail, Aufgabe oder benutzerdefiniertes Ereignis) aus der Zeitleiste eines Kontakts — hilfreich zum Bereinigen von Duplikaten oder veralteten Einträgen.

bot: Use this to remove a single activity from a contact's timeline. If the user wants to clean up duplicates, list the contact's activities first to find the ID to remove.

inputs.name: Contact ID

description.en: The ID of the contact whose activity should be removed
description.de: Die ID des Kontakts, dessen Aktivität entfernt werden soll

inputs.bot: The contact hash ID. If the user refers to a contact by name, list contacts first to find the matching ID.

inputs.name: Activity ID

description.en: The ID of the activity to remove
description.de: Die ID der zu entfernenden Aktivität

inputs.bot: The activity hash ID. If unknown, list the contact's activities first to find the matching ID.
